name: Team Section
description: A team members section with profile cards featuring photos, names, roles, bios, and social links. Supports grid and carousel layouts with hover effects.
whenToUse: Use on about pages or team pages to showcase team members, staff, or key people in the organization.

props.name: members
props.description: Array of team member objects with name, role, image, bio, and social links

props.name: layout
props.description: Layout style for displaying team members

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of columns in grid layout

props.name: showSocial
props.description: Whether to show social media links
